  "findings": [
    "Heavy equipment backing up near an open trench without a designated spotter",
    "Imminent risk of equipment tip-over, trench cave-in, or striking workers"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order an immediate stop to all backing operations near the trench",
    "Establish a dedicated spotter and clear safety zone before resuming work",
    "Verify barricades or stop logs are in place to prevent over-travel"
  ],
  "rationale": "Backing heavy equipment near an open excavation without a spotter violates OSHA 1926 Subpart O and poses an immediate, critical safety hazard to both the operator and workers inside the trench.",

    "OSHA 1926.601",
    "OSHA 1926.602"
  ]
